entry.title: The new Porsche Panamera Deep Dive - Powertrain

link.title: The new Porsche Panamera Deep Dive - Powertrain

entry.content: Porsche underlines its goal to deliver the best performance in the class by in some cases significantly boosting the engine output. This particularly applies to the new Panamera Turbo S. Engine expert Arno Bögl explains the details.
entry.summary: Porsche underlines its goal to deliver the best performance in the class by in some cases significantly boosting the engine output. This particularly applies to the new Panamera Turbo S. Engine expert Arno Bögl explains the details.

entry.title: Côte d’Ivoire : Blé Goudé s’exprime au sujet de Ouattara

link.title: Côte d’Ivoire : Blé Goudé s’exprime au sujet de Ouattara

entry.content:
Dans une interview réalisée le 5 septembre à La Haye, aux Pays-Bas, le président du COJEP (Congrès Panafricain pour la Justice et l’Egalité), Charles Blé Goudé, s’exprime au sujet de la Côte d’Ivoire et de la candidature d’Alassane Ouattara. Il répond aux questions de Viviane Forson.
www.lepoint.fr
entry.summary: Dans une interview réalisée le 5 septembre à La Haye, aux Pays-Bas, le président du COJEP (Congrès Panafricain pour la Justice et l’Egalité), Charles Blé Goudé, s’exprime au sujet de la Côte d’Ivoire et de la candidature d’Alassane Ouattara. Il répond aux questions de Viviane Forson. www.lepoint.fr

entry.title: #Coronavirusindia : భారత్ లో రికార్డు స్థాయి లో నమోదు అవుతున్న Corona కేసులు #IndiaFightsCorona

link.title: #Coronavirusindia : భారత్ లో రికార్డు స్థాయి లో నమోదు అవుతున్న Corona కేసులు #IndiaFightsCorona

entry.content:
India registers record one-day spike of 83,883 coronavirus cases; tally over 38 lakh
The number of recoveries in India surged to 29,70,492 as 68,584 cases were reported discharged from coronavirus treatment on Thursday.
#Indiafightscorona
#Coronavirusindia
#Coronavirus
#Andhrapradesh
#Karnataka
#Tamilnadu
#Maharashtra
గడిచిన 24 గంటల్లో మనదేశంలో 11,72,179 శాంపిల్స్ పరీక్షించారు. భారత్‌లో ఇప్పటి వరకు 4 కోట్ల 55 లక్షల 9,380 మందికి కరోనా పరీక్షలు నిర్వహించినట్లు కేంద్ర ఆరోగ్య కుటుంబ సంక్షేమశాఖ తెలిపింది.
entry.summary: India registers record one-day spike of 83,883 coronavirus cases; tally over 38 lakh The number of recoveries in India surged to 29,70,492 as 68,584 cases were reported discharged from coronavirus treatment on Thursday. #Indiafightscorona #Coronavirusindia #Coronavirus #Andhrapradesh #Karnataka #Tamilnadu #Maharashtra గడిచిన 24 గంటల్లో మనదేశంలో 11,72,179 శాంపిల్స్ పరీక్షించారు. భారత్‌లో ఇప్పటి వరకు 4 కోట్ల 55 లక్షల 9,380 మందికి కరోనా పరీక్షలు నిర్వహించినట్లు కేంద్ర ఆరోగ్య కుటుంబ సంక్షేమశాఖ తెలిపింది.

entry.title: Shiv Sena का PM Modi पर तंज, कहा- Economy छोड़ सभी मुद्दों पर बात करते हैं वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Shiv Sena का PM Modi पर तंज, कहा- Economy छोड़ सभी मुद्दों पर बात करते हैं वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Shiv Sena taunts PM Modi, says- talks on all issues except economy. Shiv Sena MP Sanjay Raut on Sunday accused Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman that she is blaming God for the decline in the country’s economy.
शिवसेना सांसद संजय राउत ने रविवार को केंद्रीय वित्त मंत्री निर्मला सीतारमण पर आरोप लगाया कि देश की अर्थव्यवस्था में गिरावट के लिए वो ईश्वर को दोष दे रही हैं.
#ShivSena #SanjayRaut #PMModi
entry.summary: Shiv Sena taunts PM Modi, says- talks on all issues except economy. Shiv Sena MP Sanjay Raut on Sunday accused Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman that she is blaming God for the decline in the country’s economy. शिवसेना सांसद संजय राउत ने रविवार को केंद्रीय वित्त मंत्री निर्मला सीतारमण पर आरोप लगाया कि देश की अर्थव्यवस्था में गिरावट के लिए वो ईश्वर को दोष दे रही हैं. #ShivSena #SanjayRaut #PMModi

link.title: #TDF2020 - Stage 14 -Kragh Andersen takes his chance !

entry.content:
Discover the highlights of Tour de France 2020’s Stage 14 - Clermont-Ferrand / Lyon.
Stage Ranking:
1 - KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren (TEAM SUNWEB)
2 - MEZGEC Luka (MITCHELTON - SCOTT)
3 - CONSONNI Simone (COFIDIS)
General Ranking:
1 - ROGLIC Primož (TEAM JUMBO - VISMA)
2 - POGACAR Tadej (UAE TEAM EMIRATES)
3 - BERNAL GOMEZ Egan (INEOS GRENADIERS)
More information on:

entry.title: Tour de France 2020 - Jérémy Roy ambassadeur d’Ecosystem

link.title: Tour de France 2020 - Jérémy Roy ambassadeur d’Ecosystem

entry.content: L’ancien cycliste professionnel Jérémy Roy, ambassadeur d’ecosystem sur le Tour de France 2020 est entré dans la grande boucle, ce vendredi 4 septembre. Jérémy accompagne ecosystem sur son 1er Tour de France, et a pour mission de motiver les clubs cyclistes, les passionnés du Tour à participer à la collecte exceptionnelle de téléphones usagés, organisée depuis fin juillet. Il est également un porte-parole de choix pour véhiculer les bons gestes préconisés par ecosystem, en matière de recyclage des appareils électriques. Jusqu’à la fin du Tour, Il promeut aux côtés d’ecosystem, l’appel aux dons de téléphones et smartphones usagés via le site Je Donne Mon Téléphone . Cette opération permet d’offrir 100 mobiles reconditionnés au profit d’associations locales dans chacune ville-étape du Tour.
entry.summary: L’ancien cycliste professionnel Jérémy Roy, ambassadeur d’ecosystem sur le Tour de France 2020 est entré dans la grande boucle, ce vendredi 4 septembre. Jérémy accompagne ecosystem sur son 1er Tour de France, et a pour mission de motiver les clubs cyclistes, les passionnés du Tour à participer à la collecte exceptionnelle de téléphones usagés, organisée depuis fin juillet. Il est également un porte-parole de choix pour véhiculer les bons gestes préconisés par ecosystem, en matière de recyclage des appareils électriques. Jusqu’à la fin du Tour, Il promeut aux côtés d’ecosystem, l’appel aux dons de téléphones et smartphones usagés via le site Je Donne Mon Téléphone . Cette opération permet d’offrir 100 mobiles reconditionnés au profit d’associations locales dans chacune ville-étape du Tour.

entry.content: El técnico del Napoli dejó claro que Hirving está concentrado y ya no piensa como en los equipos que militaba

entry.title: Drunk - Bande annonce VOST avec Mads Mikkelsen

link.title: Drunk - Bande annonce VOST avec Mads Mikkelsen

entry.content:
Quatre amis décident de mettre en pratique la théorie d’un psychologue norvégien selon laquelle l’homme aurait dès la naissance un déficit d’alcool dans le sang. Avec une rigueur scientifique, chacun relève le défi en espérant tous que leur vie n’en sera que meilleure ! Si dans un premier temps les résultats sont encourageants, la situation devient rapidement hors de contrôle.
Le 14 Octobre au cinéma.
entry.summary: Quatre amis décident de mettre en pratique la théorie d’un psychologue norvégien selon laquelle l’homme aurait dès la naissance un déficit d’alcool dans le sang. Avec une rigueur scientifique, chacun relève le défi en espérant tous que leur vie n’en sera que meilleure ! Si dans un premier temps les résultats sont encourageants, la situation devient rapidement hors de contrôle. Le 14 Octobre au cinéma.

entry.title: Love 020 Ep 04 Part 2 Yang Yang Chinese Hit Drama

link.title: Love 020 Ep 04 Part 2 Yang Yang Chinese Hit Drama

entry.content:
Subscribe to this channel for more full episodes of amazing tv series with English subtitles.
Love O2O (Chinese: 微微一笑很倾城; pinyin: Wēi Wēi Yī Xiào Hěn Qīng Chéng) is a 2016 Chinese television series based on the novel of the same name written by Gu Man, starring Zheng Shuang and Yang Yang. It aired on Jiangsu TV and Dragon TV from 22 August to 6 September 2016. The drama is a commercial success in China.
Love O2O revolves around the love story of a first-year and a final year student who fell in love with each other while playing an online video game. It revolves around the couple as they overcome different challenges and numerous obstacles.
This series has a total of 30 episodes. You can watch them here for free without any error.
A lot of other series are available here too.
If you like the effort then please subscribe to our Youtube Channel and turn the Bell Notifications on to get notified every time we upload new videos.
Get subscribed to this blog to get notified of our latest uploads.
Keep visiting our blog for more amazing content.
Thanks!
Enjoy the Episode.
If you don’t find your desired TV series, you can ask for it in the comment section or on the blog.
entry.summary: Subscribe to this channel for more full episodes of amazing tv series with English subtitles. Love O2O (Chinese: 微微一笑很倾城; pinyin: Wēi Wēi Yī Xiào Hěn Qīng Chéng) is a 2016 Chinese television series based on the novel of the same name written by Gu Man, starring Zheng Shuang and Yang Yang. It aired on Jiangsu TV and Dragon TV from 22 August to 6 September 2016. The drama is a commercial success in China. Love O2O revolves around the love story of a first-year and a final year student who fell in love with each other while playing an online video game. It revolves around the couple as they overcome different challenges and numerous obstacles. This series has a total of 30 episodes. You can watch them here for free without any error. A lot of other series are available here too. If you like the effort then please subscribe to our Youtube Channel and turn the Bell Notifications on to get notified every time we upload new videos. Get subscribed to this blog to get notified of our latest uploads. Keep visiting our blog for more amazing content. Thanks! Enjoy the Episode. If you don’t find your desired TV series, you can ask for it in the comment section or on the blog.

entry.title: Ease Of Doing Business లో Andhra Pradesh స్థానం పై TDP వ్యాఖ్యలు Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Ease Of Doing Business లో Andhra Pradesh స్థానం పై TDP వ్యాఖ్యలు Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Andhra Pradesh retains top position in ease of doing business 2019 ranking.Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman, Minister of State for Commerce and Industry Piyush Goyal and Cabinet Minister Hardeep Singh Puri released the ranking.
#EaseOfDoingBusiness
#Andhrapradesh
#Telangana
#Apgovt
#Uttarpradesh
#Ysjagan
#ChandrababuNaidu
#TDP
#Ysrcp
ఓ టిడిపి అభిమాని ట్వీట్ చేస్తూ..2014లో రాష్ట్రం విడిపోయిన తర్వాత మరుసటి ఏడాదికే ఈజ్ ఆఫ్ డూయింగ్ బిజినెస్‌లో ఏపీ నంబర్ వన్‌గా నిలిచింది. చంద్రబాబు పాలనలో దాన్ని నిలబెట్టుకుంటూ వచ్చిందని చంద్రబాబు అభిమాని ఒకరు ట్వీట్ చేశారు.
entry.summary: Andhra Pradesh retains top position in ease of doing business 2019 ranking.Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman, Minister of State for Commerce and Industry Piyush Goyal and Cabinet Minister Hardeep Singh Puri released the ranking. #EaseOfDoingBusiness #Andhrapradesh #Telangana #Apgovt #Uttarpradesh #Ysjagan #ChandrababuNaidu #TDP #Ysrcp ఓ టిడిపి అభిమాని ట్వీట్ చేస్తూ..2014లో రాష్ట్రం విడిపోయిన తర్వాత మరుసటి ఏడాదికే ఈజ్ ఆఫ్ డూయింగ్ బిజినెస్‌లో ఏపీ నంబర్ వన్‌గా నిలిచింది. చంద్రబాబు పాలనలో దాన్ని నిలబెట్టుకుంటూ వచ్చిందని చంద్రబాబు అభిమాని ఒకరు ట్వీట్ చేశారు.

entry.title: Territoire zéro chômeur :

link.title: Territoire zéro chômeur :

entry.content:
Une proposition de loi portée par la majorité prévoit de prolonger l’expérimentation contre le chômage de longue durée mise en place sous la précédente législature. Le texte prévoit de quadrupler le nombre de territoires bénéficiaires, mais un consensus s’est dégagé mercredi en commission pour aller plus loin.
www.lcp.fr/actualites/territoires-zero-chomeur-les-deputes-veulent-amplifier-le-nombre-de-projets-34519
entry.summary: Une proposition de loi portée par la majorité prévoit de prolonger l’expérimentation contre le chômage de longue durée mise en place sous la précédente législature. Le texte prévoit de quadrupler le nombre de territoires bénéficiaires, mais un consensus s’est dégagé mercredi en commission pour aller plus loin. www.lcp.fr/actualites/territoires-zero-chomeur-les-deputes-veulent-amplifier-le-nombre-de-projets-34519

entry.title: Ce composé anti-âge naturel a montré des résultats extrêmement prometteurs

link.title: Ce composé anti-âge naturel a montré des résultats extrêmement prometteurs

entry.content:
Produit par le corps humain, l’alpha-cétoglutarate (AKG) est le fruit de différents processus métaboliques. 
Si la molécule n’est pas présente dans les aliments, sa production peut être améliorée via l’exercice ou le jeûne. 
Généralement proposée sous forme de compléments, celle-ci est notamment consommée par certains sportifs.
Des chercheurs ont étudié les effets d’une supplémentation de cette molécule sur la longévité et la santé.
Lors de cette nouvelle étude les souris traitées vivaient en moyenne 12 % plus longtemps.
Les souris vivaient également en meilleure santé plus longtemps.
entry.summary: Produit par le corps humain, l’alpha-cétoglutarate (AKG) est le fruit de différents processus métaboliques. Si la molécule n’est pas présente dans les aliments, sa production peut être améliorée via l’exercice ou le jeûne. Généralement proposée sous forme de compléments, celle-ci est notamment consommée par certains sportifs. Des chercheurs ont étudié les effets d’une supplémentation de cette molécule sur la longévité et la santé. Lors de cette nouvelle étude les souris traitées vivaient en moyenne 12 % plus longtemps. Les souris vivaient également en meilleure santé plus longtemps.

entry.title: Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Episode 17 Season 2

link.title: Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Episode 17 Season 2

entry.content:
Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Episode 17 Season 2.
Diriliş: Ertuğrul (URDU: "Resurrection: Ertuğrul") is a Turkish historical fiction and adventure television series created by Mehmet Bozdağ, starring Engin Altan Düzyatan in the namesake leading role. It was filmed in Riva, a village in the Beykoz district of Istanbul, Turkey, and premiered on TRT 1 in Turkey on December 10, 2014. The show is based on the history of the Muslim Oghuz Turks and takes place in the 13th century. It centers around the life of Ertuğrul, the father of Osman I, who was the founder of the Ottoman Empire. It has been well received, particularly in the Muslim world. Esra Bilgiç Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Esra Bilgiç . Hindi Esra Bilgiç Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Esra Bilgiç Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Esra Bilgiç Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Esra Bilgiç Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Esra Bilgiç
entry.summary: Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Episode 17 Season 2. Diriliş: Ertuğrul (URDU: "Resurrection: Ertuğrul") is a Turkish historical fiction and adventure television series created by Mehmet Bozdağ, starring Engin Altan Düzyatan in the namesake leading role. It was filmed in Riva, a village in the Beykoz district of Istanbul, Turkey, and premiered on TRT 1 in Turkey on December 10, 2014. The show is based on the history of the Muslim Oghuz Turks and takes place in the 13th century. It centers around the life of Ertuğrul, the father of Osman I, who was the founder of the Ottoman Empire. It has been well received, particularly in the Muslim world. Esra Bilgiç Ertugrul Ghazi Urdu - Hindi Esra Bilgiç . entry.title: REPLAY. Covid-19 : ‘Nous devons réussir à vivre avec le virus sans rentrer dans une logique de confinement généralisé’… Regardez le discours de Jean Castex en intégralité

link.title: REPLAY. Covid-19 : ‘Nous devons réussir à vivre avec le virus sans rentrer dans une logique de confinement généralisé’… Regardez le discours de Jean Castex en intégralité

entry.content:
Dans son allocution, le Premier ministre a notamment annoncé la réduction de la période d’isolement de 14 à sept jours et le chiffre de 42 départements "classés rouges".
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Thomas’ Not-So-Lucky Day - US (HD) Season 24

link.title: Thomas’ Not-So-Lucky Day - US (HD) Season 24

entry.content:
When Thomas has a run of bad luck, he tries everything to get back on track… even if it means following Lorenzo’s strange, superstitious advice!
Thomas & Friends is owned and is the copyright of Mattel Television. No money has been, or ever will be made from this video.
entry.summary: When Thomas has a run of bad luck, he tries everything to get back on track… even if it means following Lorenzo’s strange, superstitious advice! Thomas & Friends is owned and is the copyright of Mattel Television. No money has been, or ever will be made from this video.

entry.title: Ujicoba Pembelajaran tatap muka

link.title: Ujicoba Pembelajaran tatap muka

entry.content:
SUKABUMI, KOMPAS.TV - Ratusan Siswa SMA dan SMK di Kota Sukabumi Jawa Barat , hari ini melakukan Ujicoba Pembelajaran tatap muka dimasing masing Sekolahnya. salah satunya di SMK Negeri satu Kota Sukabumi, di jalan Kabandungan Kecamatan Cikole, Kota Sukabumi. Ratusan siswa yang seluruhnya berasal dari kelas 10 ini, yang terdiri dari 10 jurusan peminatan pembelajaran ini, melaksanakan ujicoba pembelajaran tatap muka dengan mematuhi protokol kesehatan yang diterapkan standar pemerintah. mereka berangkat kesekolah dengan diantarkan oleh orang tuanya.
Pembelajaran tatap muka ini hanya dilakukan oleh 12 siswa saja perkelasnya, dengan 7 rombel pembelajaran. 12 siswa tersebut di keesokan harinya akan diganti atau roling dengan siswa lainnya bergantian, sehingga seluruh siswa bisa merasakan belajar disekolah. sementara siswa lain yang tidak masuk pembelajaran disekolah, masih melakukan pembelajaran via online. siswapun harus membawa peralatan prokotol kesehatan, juga makanan dan minuman sendiri. Pembelajaran ini dimulai dari pukul setengah delapan pagi sampai setengah 12 siang.
sekolah yang melaksanakan ujicoba pembelajaran tatap muka ini, adalah sekolah yang direkomendasikan oleh dinas pendidikan setempat juga satgas Covid 19 Kota Sukabumi. yang sebelumnya telah dilakukan Monitoring terkait persiapan Pembelajaran tatap muka
entry.summary: SUKABUMI, KOMPAS.TV - Ratusan Siswa SMA dan SMK di Kota Sukabumi Jawa Barat , hari ini melakukan Ujicoba Pembelajaran tatap muka dimasing masing Sekolahnya. salah satunya di SMK Negeri satu Kota Sukabumi, di jalan Kabandungan Kecamatan Cikole, Kota Sukabumi. Ratusan siswa yang seluruhnya berasal dari kelas 10 ini, yang terdiri dari 10 jurusan peminatan pembelajaran ini, melaksanakan ujicoba pembelajaran tatap muka dengan mematuhi protokol kesehatan yang diterapkan standar pemerintah. mereka berangkat kesekolah dengan diantarkan oleh orang tuanya. Pembelajaran tatap muka ini hanya dilakukan oleh 12 siswa saja perkelasnya, dengan 7 rombel pembelajaran. 12 siswa tersebut di keesokan harinya akan diganti atau roling dengan siswa lainnya bergantian, sehingga seluruh siswa bisa merasakan belajar disekolah. sementara siswa lain yang tidak masuk pembelajaran disekolah, masih melakukan pembelajaran via online. siswapun harus membawa peralatan prokotol kesehatan, juga makanan dan minuman sendiri. Pembelajaran ini dimulai dari pukul setengah delapan pagi sampai setengah 12 siang. sekolah yang melaksanakan ujicoba pembelajaran tatap muka ini, adalah sekolah yang direkomendasikan oleh dinas pendidikan setempat juga satgas Covid 19 Kota Sukabumi. yang sebelumnya telah dilakukan Monitoring terkait persiapan Pembelajaran tatap muka

entry.title: How to Juggle

link.title: How to Juggle

entry.content: Professional juggler Jack Kalvan teaches you everything you need to know about the basics of juggling. By the end of this tutorial, you’ll have learned how to juggle one, two, three and four balls simultaneously.
entry.summary: Professional juggler Jack Kalvan teaches you everything you need to know about the basics of juggling. By the end of this tutorial, you’ll have learned how to juggle one, two, three and four balls simultaneously.

entry.title: Ankita Lokhande on Rhea’s arrest: ‘Should she have allowed a depressed man to consume drugs?’

link.title: Ankita Lokhande on Rhea’s arrest: ‘Should she have allowed a depressed man to consume drugs?’

entry.content: Ankita Lokhande, actress and former girlfriend of late actor Sushant Singh Rajput, recently took to her Instagram handle to put out yet another post clarifying her stand on one of her previous posts about ‘karma’ and ‘fate’ and to set the record straight for the media, who has been asking her if she feels Sushant was murdered or committed suicide.
entry.summary: Ankita Lokhande, actress and former girlfriend of late actor Sushant Singh Rajput, recently took to her Instagram handle to put out yet another post clarifying her stand on one of her previous posts about ‘karma’ and ‘fate’ and to set the record straight for the media, who has been asking her if she feels Sushant was murdered or committed suicide.

entry.title: Pinkan Mambo Belajar Bisnis dari Main Monopoli

link.title: Pinkan Mambo Belajar Bisnis dari Main Monopoli

entry.content:
Penyanyi Pinkan Mambo buka suara mengenai diri yang dikabarkan jatuh miskin. Parahnya lagi dia terpaksa berjualan pisang goreng demi menghidupi buah hatinya.
Pinkan Mambo mengakui, pandemi Covid-19 membuatnya susah mendapat pekerjaan. Pelantun "Kekasih yang Tak Dianggap" ini keteteran untuk membayar beberapa cicilan yang menjadi kewajibannya.
Link Terkait:
#PinkanMambo #Penyanyi
Video Editor : Suciati
=====================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Penyanyi Pinkan Mambo buka suara mengenai diri yang dikabarkan jatuh miskin. Parahnya lagi dia terpaksa berjualan pisang goreng demi menghidupi buah hatinya. Pinkan Mambo mengakui, pandemi Covid-19 membuatnya susah mendapat pekerjaan. Pelantun "Kekasih yang Tak Dianggap" ini keteteran untuk membayar beberapa cicilan yang menjadi kewajibannya. Link Terkait: #PinkanMambo #Penyanyi Video Editor : Suciati ===================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: La face cachée du télétravail

link.title: La face cachée du télétravail

entry.content:
Le télétravail se généralise pour des millions de Français. Il était exceptionnel, il devient la norme. Et pour certains, c’est un enfer… "Complément d’enquête" sur ce qui sera peut-être le mode de travail de demain./>
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le télétravail se généralise pour des millions de Français. Il était exceptionnel, il devient la norme. Et pour certains, c’est un enfer… "Complément d’enquête" sur ce qui sera peut-être le mode de travail de demain./> Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
